svg.text: Core Distribution — Module Block Diagram (Current / Stable)
RP2350 Dual-Core · 200 MHz overclock · SPSC IC Ring · No mutex
LP_GET → poll for queued speech (200 opus / 404 idle)
Core 0 — Audio / UI / Opus Decode + MIC Capture
Stack: 16 KB (Main RAM top) · sleep_us(1000) per loop
Purple path = NEW MIC capture: INMP441 → I2S IN → opus_encode → IC Ring → Core1 → POST Cloud
Decode: opus_stream.c — SILK fixed-point, VLA ~3 KB, pcm[480] static (TTS playback)
Encode: mic.c — 16 kHz mono VOIP, 8 kbps CBR, complexity 0, ~20 B/frame (MIC capture)
Both run on Core0 — decode on IC_MSG_TTS_OPUS_PKT, encode on mic_pump() per tick
